basics.name: Rafael Greca Vieira
basics.label: Machine Learning Researcher
basics.summary: Italian-Brazilian with 1 year of experience as a data scientist and almost 2 years as a researcher in Machine Learning, accumulating knowledge in the areas of Natural Language Processing, Computer Vision, tabular data, and productization of the models developed.

work.name: CPQD
work.summary: Full-time Machine Learning Researcher at CPQD.
highlights: Development of an algorithm for Voice Activity Detection using Deep Learning with PyTorch.

Development of an algorithm for Sound Event Classification using Machine Learning techniques. In addition, the developed model was embedded in hardware using the C programming language and before that was put into production using Docker and Streamlit.
Helped develop an algorithm for classifying sleep stages using Machine Learning techniques.

Development of an algorithm for Sentiment Analysis using a combination of Machine Learning and Deep Learning techniques with Keras. In addition, the developed model was put into production using Docker and Flask.

work.name: SMARKIO
work.summary: Full-time Data Scientist at SMARKIO Brazil.
highlights: Development of an algorithm for text clustering using Machine Learning.
Development of an algorithm for sentiment analysis in texts using Machine Learning and statistical algorithms (VADER, TextBlob, etc...).
Development of an algorithm for clustering topics in texts using Machine Learning.
Development of an algorithm for detecting the best communication channels for customers using statistics and Machine Learning.
Development of algorithms for the data preprocessing and visualization stage.

work.name: B2ML
highlights: Updating and maintenance of a web platform aimed at reconciling company receivables.
